summary: PDF document generation project with ongoing visual adjustments.

existing_features.title: In the PDF generator utility (frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts), remove any yellow border or yellow-colored rectangle/line drawn at the top header section of the generated PDF document.

In the PDF generator utility (frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts), increase the font size for all text rendered throughout the entire PDF document — including headers, field labels, field values, section titles, and footer text — so the document is more readable.

new_feature_requests.summary: Remove yellow borders at the header of PDF
Increase text size for the entire PDF document
